definition: solid in the form of a cone that may be truncated and defined by an axis, a point on the axis, the semi-angle of the cone, and a distance giving the location in the negative direction along the axis from the point to the base of the cone

definition_ml.en: solid in the form of a cone that may be truncated and defined by an axis, a point on the axis, the semi-angle of the cone, and a distance giving the location in the negative direction along the axis from the point to the base of the cone

note: NOTE 1  A radius is given, which, if nonzero, gives the size and location of a truncated face of the cone.||NOTE 2  The location of the cone is a point on the axis of the cone and on one of the planar circular faces, or, if radius is zero, at the apex.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right circular cone whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.

note_ml.en: NOTE 1  A radius is given, which, if nonzero, gives the size and location of a truncated face of the cone.||NOTE 2  The location of the cone is a point on the axis of the cone and on one of the planar circular faces, or, if radius is zero, at the apex.||NOTE 3  The property axis1_placement3d specifies the local coordinate system of the right circular cone whereas the property location specifies the position of the origin of the local coordinate system within the geometric context.
